# Retail Operations Notes

Use only active stores and closed actual records for the Q3 baseline and Q4 analysis periods.
The generated database intentionally contains forecast, subtotal, test, and old-period records that should not drive final metrics.
The infographic should emphasize an operations triage story rather than showing SQL output or raw table extracts.
Use the ranking rules file for formulas, component weights, normalization, and tie-break order.
